creator: david.brodin@sverigesradio.se
text:
Hi,

I am seeing this same problem in FreeBSD10, sometimes its a positive value, sometimes a negative value.
[david@fbsd ~]$ uname -a
FreeBSD fbsd.sr.se 10.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE #0 r260789: Thu Jan 16 22:34:59 UTC 2014     root@snap.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

[david@fbsd ~]$ pkg info net-snmp
net-snmp-5.7.2_4
Name           : net-snmp
Version        : 5.7.2_4
Installed on   : Wed Mar 19 20:59:36 CET 2014
Origin         : net-mgmt/net-snmp
Architecture   : freebsd:10:x86:64


Best regards,
David B
